headline: Merck (MRK) Wins FDA Approval For First Oral PCSK9 Cholesterol Drug
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) received FDA approval for Lipfendra (enlicitide), the first oral PCSK9 cholesterol-lowering drug. Lipfendra introduces an oral option for patients who have so far relied on injectable PCSK9 therapies. The approval expands Merck’s presence in cardiovascular medicine as key products approach patent expirations. Merck, trading around $127.5, is adding Lipfendra to its portfolio at a time when NYSE:MRK has posted a 64.8% return over the past year and 92.2% over five years. The...
